creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-12-13 00:25:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/abgx360gui  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  abgx360gui is a frontend for the command-line application
  sysutils/abgx360. It allows the user to easily select abgx360 options.
  It can output an abgx360 log to a new xterm window, a text file,
  or an HTML file.
  
  WWW: http://abgx360.net/
  
  PR:             ports/141160
  Submitted by:   okeeblow <root at cooltrainer.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1150    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/sysutils/abgx360gui/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/abgx360gui/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/abgx360gui/pkg-descr (new)
